grant_title: Healthcare and Wellness Grants by HFNJ
eligible_applicant_type: Private, non-profit organizations with 501(c)(3) tax-exempt status
geographic_restrictions: Greater Newark, New Jersey (including Essex, Morris, Somerset, Union, and parts of Sussex counties) and the Jewish community of Greater MetroWest New Jersey
project_area: Healthcare, mental health, wellness, and health-related prevention/promotion initiatives for underserved populations
demographic_requirements: Vulnerable, underserved individuals and families, with priority given to those in Newark, NJ, and Jewish communities in Greater MetroWest NJ
eligibility_summary: Non-profit organizations with 501(c)(3) status serving vulnerable populations in designated NJ counties or Jewish communities. Excludes individuals, government agencies, and organizations outside the catchment area. Projects must align with health/wellness and cannot fund food, homeless services (unless medical/mental health-related), legal fees, housing costs, individual healthcare, fundraising, or advocacy.
